keyPointsSummary: 'May have' expresses uncertainty about something that might have happened in the past

quickQuiz.hindi: शायद उसने यह किताब पढ़ी होगी।
quickQuiz.answer: She may have read this book.

quickQuiz.hindi: शायद उन्होंने मुझे फोन किया होगा।

quickQuiz.answer: He may have made a mistake.
He may have told the truth.

quickQuiz.hindi: शायद वह देर से पहुँची होगी।
शायद हमने गलत रास्ता चुना होगा।
quickQuiz.answer: We may have chosen the wrong path.

quickQuiz.hindi: शायद उसने मुझसे झूठ बोला होगा।
quickQuiz.answer: He may not have told me the truth.

mustRememberRules: 'May have' expresses uncertainty about something that might have happened in the past
